snippet.title: Mark Rober's Dangerous Strategy On Hot Ones
snippet.description:
Mark Rober recently appeared on Hot Ones and made a big mistake. I'm a big fan of both Mark and Hot Ones, so don't think this makes me any less of a fan, but I do believe it's important to call out medical misinformation when it appears on such a larger platform from such influential people. To combat the pain of the heat, Mark used Chloraseptic Throat Numbing Spray. The instructions on the back of the bottle state you should not use more than 5 sprays per every 2 hours for adults. Mark and Sean Evans clearly used it dozens of times, and even appeared to swallow it, which you're not supposed to do. The FDA has actually issued warnings about this. So, if you want to avoid pain from spicy foods, might I recommend just dialing down the spice level to begin with. #shorts #shorts 

I LOVE reading your comments and take your suggestions seriously. If there’s a subject you want me to discuss or something you’d like for me to react to, leave a comment down below. Many of my videos have been born out of suggestions directly from you, so don’t hold back!
-Doctor Mike Varshavski

Help us continue the fight against medical misinformation and change the world through charity by becoming a Doctor Mike Resident on Patreon where every month I donate 100% of the proceeds to the charity, organization, or cause of your choice! Residents get access to bonus content, exclusive live streams, and many other perks for just $10 a month Become a Resident today:

https://www.patreon.com/doctormike

Please SUBSCRIBE for new videos every Wednesday afternoon and Sunday morning!  https://goo.gl/87kYq6

snippet.title: Gatos Silver News (#GATO) Gato Stock 📉 SHAREHOLDERS In Gatos Silver Securities Class Action $GATO
snippet.description:
👉 April 25, 2022 Deadline 👉 Register Now Here https://bit.ly/GATOSILVER  Gatos Silver News (#GATO) Gato Stock 📉 SHAREHOLDERS In Gatos Silver Securities Class Action $GATO

Gatos Silver News and Gato Stock

Investors, did you purchase Gatos: (a) common stock pursuant and/or traceable to the Registration Statement issued in connection with the Company’s initial public offering conducted on or about October 28, 2020; and/or (b) securities between October 28, 2020 and January 25, 2022?

The Gross Law Firm announces that a securities fraud class action lawsuit has been filed against Gatos Silver, Inc., ticker symbol G A T O

Did you lose money by investing in G A T O? And are you aware that you may recover your losses with no out of pocket costs?

Investors who purchased Gatos (a) the Company’s initial public offering conducted on or about October 28, 2020; and/or (b) securities between October 28, 2020 and January 25, 2022 may be entitled to recover losses.

These injured investors have until April 25, 2022 to join the lawsuit as a lead plaintiff.

Contact The Gross Law Firm to inquire about your recovery opportunities.

What is the G A T O lawsuit about?

The complaint filed against Gatos alleges that the company violated federal securities laws by making false and/or misleading statements and/or failing to disclose that:

(1) The technical report for Gatos’s primary mine, the Cerro Los Gatos deposit, contained certain errors.

(2) Among other things, the mineral reserves had been overestimated by as much as 50%.

(3) As a result of the foregoing, Defendants’ positive statements about the Company’s business, operations, and prospects were materially misleading and/or lacked a reasonable basis.

To get information about your rights, submit your information as an investor before the April 25, 2022 deadline.

The Gross Law Firm is ready to help you recoup your losses.



To join Click here 👉 https://bit.ly/GATOSILVER

The Gross Law Firm is committed to ensuring that companies adhere to responsible business practices and engage in good corporate citizenship. The firm seeks recovery on behalf of investors who incurred losses when false and/or misleading statements or the omission of material information by a Company lead to artificial inflation of the Company's stock. Attorney advertising. Prior results do not guarantee similar outcomes.

Gatos Silver News and Gato Stock

Register on CORE. Join more than 150K users and protect your portfolio 👉 https://www.compensationrecovery.com/...
